subject: Congratulations! You've won $1,000,000!!!
body: Click here immediately to claim your prize. Limited time only. Provide your bank details.

subject: Team standup - 10am today
body: Quick reminder that standup is at 10am in the Zoom link. Please update your tasks.

subject: PRODUCTION DOWN - All hands
body: Our main production API is down. 100% error rate. All engineers please respond immediately.

subject: Invoice #4920 Payment Required
body: Your account balance is overdue. Please settle via gift card purchases or wire transfer. Failure will result in legal action.

subject: Re: Q2 Roadmap Review
body: Following up on yesterday's discussion. I need the updated roadmap slide deck by EOD or the board meeting prep will slip.

subject: Lunch plans next week?
body: Hey! Are we still on for the team lunch on Tuesday? Let me know if you need me to book the restaurant.

subject: Unusual login attempt detected
body: We detected a login from an unrecognized IP. If this was not you, click here to secure your account.

subject: Re: Re: Merger Documentation - CONFIDENTIAL
body: As discussed in our last three calls, I am attaching the final version of the acquisition agreement. Please review Clause 7b especially. Legal needs your sign-off by market open tomorrow.

subject: Can't login - presenting in 10 min!!
body: I am completely locked out of my Salesforce account and I have a demo for a Fortune 500 client in 10 minutes. This is a $2M deal. PLEASE HELP.

subject: Your monthly wellness newsletter
body: Hello team! Here are your top 10 desk ergonomics tips for April. Stay healthy and productive!
